response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id, flight_date
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK
ATTR seat : varchar
ATTR airline_id : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR aircraft_id : varchar : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK
ATTR scheduled_departure_date : date
ATTR scheduled_departure_time : time
ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city_id : varchar : FK
ENTITY City
PK city_id
ATTR city_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar
ENTITY Aircraft
PK aircraft_id
ATTR aircraft_id : varchar : PK
ATTR registration : varchar
ATTR model : varchar
ENTITY Status
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_description : varchar
ENTITY Crew
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_role : varchar
REL Flight -> Airline : 0..N -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 0..N -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 0..N -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL Flight -> Aircraft : 0..N -> 1 : FK=aircraft_id
REL Flight -> Status : 0..N -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL Airport -> City : 0..N -> 1 : FK=city_id
REL Passenger -> Flight : 0..N -> 0..N : FK=flight_id,flight_date
REL Passenger -> Crew : 0..N -> 0..N : FK=crew_id
